The “Moves Like Jagger”
Ry Schwartz DBA Empire Engineering
2020
About:
The final 48 hours are NOT about hammering in the urgency. That’s the countdown timer’s
job ;-)
YOUR job as the conversion coach is to help your prospect overcome the various factors
that contribute to decision anxiety (not just objection handling). We do that by reinforcing
your product’s MVC and QVW while deferring the decision until the end of your guarantee
period.
Where to send it:
1. Final 48 hours of your launch/evergreen funnel
2. Long form FB Ad (retargeting cart close)
Themeplate:
1. Remove the burden of decision. Make their only job to try.
2. Take a stand against “satisfaction” and vague promises
3. State the final big outcomes
4. Bring it back to QVW in MVC
5. The game / the goalposts / the next steps (The Guarantee Close)
6. Optional PS: Close with confidence and/or testimonials
COPY SCHOOL EXAMPLE
Subject:
we prob won’t honor this guarantee
10x in 60 days or we’ll hit “undo”
Psst. you’re not supposed to know if ______ is right for you
Body:
If you’re still here having a convo with us about Copy School…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Chances are you’ve seen the guarantee.
But it’s worth reminding you that you’re NOT supposed to know if Copy School is right for
you.
How could you?
That’s like more pressure than an Insta-Pot stuck on high.
The burden of knowing isn’t on you.
Only the commitment (and excitement) of doing.
And the observable, tangible, fist pump worthy wins that follow.
Your ONLY job is to enroll, execute, and then make a final decision from a place of actual
experience… not guessing.
So let’s skip the whole decision anxiety thing.
The ROI on clammy hands and an irregular heartbeat is worse than nil.
When you enroll, we’ll give you EVERY chance to 10x your investment within 60 days.
Copy School isn’t a knowledge game...
… It’s not a “sounds cool in theory but not in practice” game
… it’s not a “maybe I got some payoff but it’s hard to tell” game
…. and it’s definitely not a “satisfaction” game either.
It’s a direct, immediate, and highly measurable results game.
And if you join us, we insist you come in with that mindset.
Yes, it’s true that by the time we reach out in a few months to chat about your biggest wins,
you’ll have a growing stack of “omg Jo, I have to tell you about this” stories to share.
By then, you’re likely to have achieved…
… up to 300% uplifts on your most highly trafficked landing pages (thanks to 10x landing
Pages)
… fast and easy to execute launch funnels that rival the performance of all that ninja stuff
you haven’t been able to get off the ground. (thanks to 10x Launches and 10x Emails)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

… high-performing long form sales pages that act as your 24/7 sales person and give you a
taste of this whole “freedom” thing the internet’s been going ape-sh*t over for the last two
decades. (10x Sales Pages)
But for now, let’s go for sumthin’ a bit more immediate.
If you have an active email list (and an offer)... choose a few email themeplates from 10x
Launches and see if you can double your ROI in a single weekend.
If you have a landing page that you’re currently paying Zucks and the googs to send leads
to… optimize it with what you learn in 10x Landing Pages and just see what your CPL looks
like by this time next week.
If you’re a copywriter, use any of these programs inside Copy School to be able to
confidently pinpoint where your client is leaving cash on the table (or lighting it on fire)...
… and then shoot over a quick proposal and save the freakin’ day while cashing a bigger
check for your heroics.
Wash. Rinse. Repeat.
And if in 60 days you don’t feel like you’re well on your way to looking like a bloody genius
and 10x’ing your investment…
Let us know and we’ll hit undo on this whole ‘let’s make you the most profitable person in the
room” experiment.
But for now… let’s skip the guessing game and get to work.
-jo
PS.
Yea… about that subject line
Of course we’ll honor the guarantee.
(I mean… we might ask you to share your favorite Ed Sheeran song just to prove you’re
human)
But after welcoming over 560 students last year, wanna take a crack at how many times we
had to issue a refund?
3
Pretty sure one was a bot.
Another was a course pirate. (yep -- that’s a thing).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

And the other was a paralegal who thought this would help him boost his trademark game.
Simply put -- when serious, growth-minded copywriters, marketers and founders join Copy
School with the full intention of putting this stuff into immediate action.
They get 10x wins.
Often within days or hours.
If you need the inspiration… you can check out those stories over on the sales page.
But if you’re ready…
I recommend you start crafting your own
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
